# voluntarypetition.org

> Filing a Voluntary Petition | voluntarypetition.org

Section 301 -- the first step in every bankruptcy case

This site is part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network -- free, open-source bankruptcy information based on national federal court data.

## Related Sites
- https://1328f.com -- Free bankruptcy discharge screener
- https://1328f.org -- Research platform
- https://bankruptcymill.org -- Bankruptcy mill detection
- https://serialfiler.org -- Serial filing restrictions
- https://dischargebar.org -- Discharge waiting periods
